# Transcrição: Lesson 17- Product Storyteller

- **Fonte:** Lesson 17- Product Storyteller
- **Duração:** 02:45
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:45]

Okay, now I want to cover what type of product to create. We're going to go through some of the various formats, the types of products you can create, as well as some of the tools that you can use to create them. But first I want to talk a little bit about this idea of this product storyteller. And you might, this might turn out into light bulbs for you. Now it's important to think about how to incorporate stories in your product and potentially how to turn your store, your product into one big story. And this isn't like some Hollywood thriller necessarily, but the more you can turn your product into a story and use stories within your product, the stronger it will be in terms of impacting people's lives and getting them to consume the product. Because we've been trained to listen to stories. That's what we do, is we tell stories as humans and we listen to stories. So in any case, this is four broad areas here that you can approach your product. And one is the interviewer. And this is where you gather up a bunch of experts, or maybe it's one expert, but it's probably, as an interviewer, you probably want to gather more than one expert and interview them. And the interviews could be on different areas or that you could interview each expert on the same topic or the same question. Like, you know, how did you get started? Or how did you learn to play guitar? Or what was the most important thing you learned about playing guitar? Or, you know, what was your biggest breakthrough in playing the guitar? Those type of things. You could be, another is you are the expert. This is where you're the teacher or the guru or you're training. Another is researcher. And this is, there are products out there that are just nothing but research. You know, where someone's gone out and done market research or they gather data, you know, in the whole stock market niche, there's a lot of products that are like this that are simply people putting out market data about the stock market or the commodities market or whatever. And then the final one here is bundler. And this is where you basically will bundle together other products, you know, products where maybe you got the resale rates or the private label rights, you got the rights to resell this product and you put together several products. Maybe you add in a piece of yours. And one thing to remember is these aren't like, you don't have to be just one of these. You could be an expert and be a teacher, but also do some interviews to round out your product or also do some research or also bundle in something else where you have some resale rates. So you don't have to use just one of these. You can use all these or some of them or whatever.
